title: Computing π with Chudnovsky and GMP
summary: Crank out as many digits of π as you desire! Limited only by your imagination! Crank out your own modest π in the browser, too! (Limited by 64-bit IEEE-754.)
content: Crank out as many digits of π as you desire!  Limited only by your imagination!  Crank out your own modest π in the browser, too! (Limited by 64-bit IEEE-754.)
